mapper.sql: id, register_id, patient_id, patient_name, physician_id, physician_name, diagnosis, total_amount, dispensation_status, dispensation_time, pharmacist, remarks, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM prescription WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM prescription WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND dispensation_status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM prescription WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM prescription WHERE dispensation_status = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE prescription SET dispensation_status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
